name: Quinn, Jo

The reported fec_lean 0.374 across 633 FEC donations is consistent with a common-name aggregation across many different people rather than one identifiable individual, so it does not corroborate identity. Not confirmable; no classification made.

evidence: 'Sheyna Webster' is a rare name with a single Austin-area professional footprint: a content and brand manager whose own portfolio site lists work for Accruent, Anaconda (including AnacondaCON 2017 and @anacondainc social) and Atomic Axis, and who is listed as Senior Demand Gen Manager at Austin-based SourceDay. The 2017 Anaconda work matches the 2017-08-01 gift date and the Austin location matches the 78752 zip; classification is an employer/occupation fallback (marketing role at Austin B2B software firms). Note a likely later married name 'Sheyna Treiber' appears in the same SourceDay/Accruent/Anaconda role history, which is consistent but not independently confirmed. No FEC PAC records and no Texas Ethics Commission lobbyist registration found.

name: Steinhauser, Susan
resolved_employer: Communities In Schools of Central Texas — CEO 2006-2024 (filed on IRS Form 990 as 'Susan Steinhauser'; publicly known as Suki Steinhauser); since 2024 Senior Director, Special Projects
evidence: IRS Form 990 filings for Communities In Schools of Central Texas (EIN 74-2369020) list the CEO for FY2020-2023 as 'Susan Steinhauser', also appearing as 'Suki Steinhauser' — confirming the legal-name/nickname bridge. Public records place a Susan M. Steinhauser in Austin 78756, matching the donor zip, and the gift to Travis County Commissioner Ann Howard (herself a former homelessness-services executive) fits a human-services nonprofit leader's giving pattern. She stepped down as CEO in September 2024, succeeded by Sharon Vigil, and remains at CIS as Senior Director, Special Projects; MBA, UT Graduate School of Business; Leadership Austin Essential Class of 2007; former Peace Corps teacher in Swaziland. No FEC ideological-PAC records and no Texas Ethics Commission lobbyist registration found.

evidence: Beverly Childress Harkey has owned and operated a licensed/registered family home childcare in Austin for ~24 years, caring for about 12 school-age children daily; a Goldthwaite, TX native who studied child development at UT Austin. Her daycare is indexed under the Allandale neighborhood of Austin, which is zip 78757, matching the donor's 78757 record. No listed street address was published, so the zip match is by neighborhood indexing rather than a direct address confirmation, hence medium rather than high confidence.

name: Limon, Joe

Two distinct Austin-area candidates surfaced and neither could be tied to the donor record: (a) a 'Joe Michael Limon' with a public-records address in Austin zip 78723, which matches the donor zip but carries no occupation or employer information, and (b) a Joe Limon who is a Battalion Chief with the Austin Fire Department (City of Austin), whose residential zip is not published anywhere found. Repeat $100 giving to Brigid Shea from 2017 through 2025 is consistent with an ordinary recurring local donor.

name: Anderson, Leslie
evidence: Could not confirm identity. The only Austin-area 'Leslie Anderson' with a 78735 tie found is Leslie J. ('Lee') Anderson, CPA, of Leslie J. Anderson CPA PC at 4425 Mopac S Bldg 3 Ste 401, Austin TX 78735 -- but that is a commercial office address on Mopac, and 78735 is also a large residential zip (Barton Creek / Circle C / southwest Austin), so a zip match against a business address is not sufficient corroboration for a residential donor record with no employer string. 'Leslie Anderson' is a very common name with 300+ Texas matches. The single $100 gift to Brigid Shea in 2021 provides no occupational signal, and the reported FEC profile (277 donations at only 0.594 partisan lean) is more consistent with name-collision aggregation across multiple people than with a single identifiable donor, so it was not used as corroboration.

name: Esparza, Thomas
resolved_employer: Law Office of Thomas Esparza, Jr., P.C. (sole practitioner, board-certified immigration & nationality law)
evidence: Best match is Thomas Esparza Jr., the only Thomas Esparza licensed as an attorney in Austin per the State Bar of Texas (bar card 06666500, licensed 1977). The record's occupation 'Atty' and employer 'Self' match him precisely: he has been a sole practitioner for 43+ years under his own P.C. He is also a former Travis County Justice of the Peace, which makes a $100 gift to a Travis County Constable candidate (George Morales) a natural courthouse-community donation. CAVEAT lowering confidence to medium: his law office and all public listings show 78704 (1811 S 1st St, South Austin), while the donor record shows 78731 (Northwest Hills). 78731 could be a residence, but no public source confirms a 78731 address for him, so identity is corroborated by occupation/employer/civic pattern rather than by zip.

name: Ballesteros, Adan
evidence: Adan Ballesteros is the sitting elected Travis County Constable, a Democrat in office since 2009 with a term running through 2028 — a sitting county official donating $100 to another constable (George Morales). Identity is corroborated by the unique name, the employer string 'Travis Co', the occupation 'Constable', and the 78691 Pflugerville zip, which matches his documented Pflugerville residency (he received the 2009 City of Pflugerville Citizen of the Year Award). IMPORTANT DATA CORRECTION: the filing lists his occupation as 'Constable Pct 4', but he is and has always been the Precinct 2 Constable (Precinct 4's constable is Stacy Suits) — this appears to be a filer error in the campaign finance record. Career: law enforcement since 1979, Certified Master Texas Peace Officer, former Texas DPS trooper and narcotics investigator in the Rio Grande Valley, commanded the DPS Narcotics Training Section. No FEC records and no Texas Ethics Commission lobbyist registration found, as expected for a sitting law-enforcement officeholder.

affiliations.snippet: 'Adan Ballesteros is a member of the Travis County Constable in Texas, representing Precinct 2... assumed office in 2009' and is affiliated with the Democratic Party.
